transcript.text:
What's good to eat around here?
Mussel rice, Barnacle Noodles,
Squid soup
Those 3 are a must
[Let's go!]
[Welcome]
[Barnacle Rice, Mussel Rice, Barnacle Noodles]
[Barnacle Kalguksu (Knife-cut noodles with barnacle soup)]
[Squid Soup]
[Spicy Squid and Pork]
[The local's recommendations]
[Eat and eat again]
[Thumbs up]
How do you eat so much with that small mouth of yours?
Incredible
Really amazing

I feel like she can eat more
Hello everyone
For today, I'm going to try Ulleung Island's barnacle(?) rice
And barnacle noodles
So I'm at the pier
They're drying squid here
There are so many squids out here
Literally everywhere I go, I see squid
Hung to dry just like this
[Found the locals]
Excuse me, Where can I go to get tasty barnacle rice and noodles?
Samjung Garden
Do you see the pharmacy with lights over there?
Go in that alleyway and you'll see a restaurant
[Come over here]
Beef...

[He watched the Tiger Cattle episode]
30 servings!
How did you know?
She ate 30 servings of beef and soybean stew
[Most people have heard of Tzuyang by now]
Are you hiding the food in your clothes?
I eat everything!
I'm on my way to the recommended restaurant
[Alley full of restaurants]
There it is!
[Gyeongsangbuk-do, Ulleung-gun] [Samjung Restaurant]
Hello~!
[Let's see the menu]
The spicy squid & pork is the most popular
Is that so? Then I'll take one of that,
Mussel barnacle rice, mussel rice, barnacle rice, barnacle noodles

By yourself?
[Rule #1: Order what you can eat]
[Cook the rice]
[While that's going...]
[Prepare the squid & pork]
[On a stone grill]
[Spicy squid & pork]
[Broth]
[Vegetables and squid guts]
[Boil]
[Squid soup]
[Barnacle Kalguksu]
[Only in Ulleung Island]
[Barnacle Kalguksu (knife-cut noodles)]
[Barnacle Rice, Mussel rice, Barnacle rice]
[Only in Ulleung Island!]

[Complete]
The heat is on
This needs to be cooked
It's on a stone grill
Looks tasty
This won't fill me up
The barnacles look like mini-abalone
This is the squid intestines soup
It has guts and squid meat
Bon appetit!
[Full of barnacles]
There's soy sauce here, but I'll try 1 bite without it
Get a bunch of barnacles,
That's very savory
It's really chewy just like abalone
Very chewy

That sesame taste is everything
Put a bit of soy sauce in here
Mix it
[And take a big bite]
It's something we're used to eating Soy sauce rice(?)
Soy sauce egg rice
Check the colors
[With garlic leek kimchi]
I've been told there are lots of wild leek out here
So they're known for their garlic leek and bujigaeni leaf
They always give pickled leek
[Cooking]
It's getting cooked rather quickly, I love it
That looks good Lots of squid and pork
I've seen a lot of squid & pork restaurants around here
A lot of meat markets too

But squid & pork restaurants are everywhere
[Hurry and cook!]
Barnacle rice Let's finish it
With pickled garlic leek
Let's try the kalguksu now Look at the colors
The soup looks thick
This is really deep
The broth itself is different
The noodles are pretty wide Almost double the size
The noodles are amazing
The soup is thick
[Squid soup next!]
[Looks very refreshing]
Really refreshing
This goes well with wild leek kimchi
[Let's try the barnacle mussel rice now!]

It's that lady from the television
Hello
[Hear me out]
How do you eat so much with that small mouth of yours?
[I'm curious too]
Thank you for coming to see me
[Telling them about Tzuyang]
Our serving portions are big too
We give a lot of rice
We'll see if she can finish it or not
Now for some spicy squid and pork!
It has squid and pork just like this Let's wrap it like this
This tastes really good
The sauce is pretty sweet
With some spiciness It's just about right
1 bowl down,

[Scrape out the rest]
[What a good eater]
Mussel rice
Just mussels and nothing else
Let's put some soy sauce in here
[Mix mix mix]
Mussels tend to taste a little fishy, but these aren't like that
Is it because they're fresh?
This has a clean taste Just like bean sprout soup
[Takes another bite]
Very...
How do I explain this?
[Takes another bite]
Very refreshing
I thought the soup will be thick because of the guts
But I guess it's different parts of the squid

The spicy squid & pork is delicious
Let's eat it together
I love the combination of these
Eat the rice, drink the soup, eat the rice again, and eat the squid & pork
I should've ordered like 4 servings of this
I want more
[What's this?]
Is this deodeok? (lance asiabell root)
It's not bad actually It's not bitter
Is this okay?
It's really not bad
I've been running this restaurant for 17 years now
I was raised in Ulleung, so I know how to do the dishes right
[She's almost done...?]
Let's make a wrap
Put the squid & pork

Garlic too
Some ssamjang (spicy seasoning paste)
It's going to be great
Such a good combination
[So many different ways to eat the food]
[Making the wrap]
[We give big portions though]
[Are you done...?]
Amazing
[This is a piece of cake!]
Refreshing
The guts are very tender
Even more tender than the squid itself
[Where did it all go?]
[The culprit]
She ate all 3 bowls of it

Amazing
I can taste the ocean
It's full of barnacles
This tastes really good
How does she not gain any weight?
[Shy]
[How many servings is that?]
So refreshing
You're amazing
I feel like she can eat more
Thanks everyone!
What should I eat tomorrow?
Dokdo!
[Dokdo Day Special!]
[With a special guest]
Kian84, so 84 of them

[Eating Dokdo prawns in front of Dokdo]
You're eating the head?
Even the shell?
Beautiful view, right?
